policy.note: This guard validates owner-facing question copy only. It never records answers or applies decisions.

findings.message: Question brief status must be owner_question_brief_ready.
Question brief must not record decisions.
Question brief must not write session files.
Question brief must not write public files.
Question brief must not write public manifests.
Question brief must keep public_ready_after_brief at 0.
Question brief must contain 6 questions.
Question brief must contain one source-root question.
Question brief must contain one question per owner card.
Question brief may reference the separate session edit plan count but must not apply edits.
Question brief summary must keep public-ready at 0.
Source-root question must be present.
Source-root safe default must match answer sheet.
Source-root allowed answers must match answer sheet.
Owner card question batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates must be present.
Owner card batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates safe default must match answer sheet.
Owner card batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates allowed answers must match answer sheet.
Owner card batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates must include usable question text.
Owner card question batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files must be present.
Owner card batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files safe default must match answer sheet.
Owner card batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files allowed answers must match answer sheet.
Owner card batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files must include usable question text.
Owner card question batch-c-model-promotion-confirmation must be present.
Owner card batch-c-model-promotion-confirmation safe default must match answer sheet.
Owner card batch-c-model-promotion-confirmation allowed answers must match answer sheet.
Owner card batch-c-model-promotion-confirmation must include usable question text.
Owner card question batch-d-sogn-benedetg-source-gap must be present.
Owner card batch-d-sogn-benedetg-source-gap safe default must match answer sheet.
Owner card batch-d-sogn-benedetg-source-gap allowed answers must match answer sheet.
Owner card batch-d-sogn-benedetg-source-gap must include usable question text.
Owner card question batch-e-kosmoasset-human-reviews must be present.
Owner card batch-e-kosmoasset-human-reviews safe default must match answer sheet.
Owner card batch-e-kosmoasset-human-reviews allowed answers must match answer sheet.
Owner card batch-e-kosmoasset-human-reviews must include usable question text.

next_actions: Use docs/codex/kosmo-owner-question-brief-2026-06-13.md as the next owner-facing question block.
Transfer only explicitly confirmed owner answers into the owner answer intake template.
Keep all decisions blocked until intake check and session edit plan pass.
